le_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7607027049718352958","book_info":{"abstract":"《春物》+《孤独摇滚》+《路人女主》《辉夜大小姐》+《五等分》+《武装少女》+《艾莉同学》+《母鸡卡》+（多女主）
　　综漫融合世界，五条凛毕生所求，唯有守着星野穹安稳摆烂。
　　怎料被平冢静强塞侍奉部，被迫周旋雪之下毒舌、团子软萌，随手罩住社恐波奇，顺带帮助了霞之丘、英梨梨、中野五姐妹等人。
　　他只当是躺平路上的小插曲，未曾想，随手释出的温柔，竟惹得一众少女动了心。
　　等他反应过来时，早已被层层占有欲围困。
　　连怯生生发抖的粉毛学妹，都攥紧他衣角红了眼：
　　“前辈……只会看着我一个人，对不对？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/3eb1fa8859e64d6b4e572b39c3d27677~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"伊利之星歌","author_id":"","book_id":"7607027049718352958","book_name":"综漫：我只想摆烂你们不要过来啊","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#383838","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2762人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":856,"name":"全能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=856&name=全能&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7607069449643901502","read_count":"2762","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"193510"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"43","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,综漫,多女主,全能,重生,二次元","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/3eb1fa8859e64d6b4e572b39c3d27677~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779381857&x-signature=9UbCnfEdd4ueACOieQZISjCgvcA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4205012782953671","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"5"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032300441719FD4B3784CCA70AF427"}"},"relate_
